base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of simon_climb_stairs — a character from 1986 castlevania. body rotated ~15° along stairs axis. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame stair-climb cycle — body rotated ~15° along stairs axis; feet alternate. Sheet has Ascend / Descend directional variants
